---
title: "pathRegistry.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\pathRegistry.ts"
loc: 59
complexity: 8
logic_score: 6.05
style_score: 3.97
intel_score: 8.10
overall_score: 5.32
---

## Intent
The `pathRegistry.ts` module implements the 'Path Sovereignty' mandate. It provides a centralized, singleton-based system for locating the project root and ensuring consistent path normalization (forward-slash standard) across the entire polyglot stack, eliminating path hallucinations.

## Interaction Protocol
Access the `registry` singleton to resolve absolute or relative paths. It is the authoritative source for project-level path transformations, ensuring that Node.js and Python agents share a unified view of the filesystem.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://path)
- [*](file://fs)

### Exports
- `currentDir`
- `PathRegistry`
- `currentDir`
- `previousDir`
- `packageJsonPath`
- `agentConfigPath`
- `normalized`
- `dir`
- `abs`
- `registry`
- `registry`
